hero.title: One platform for every link in your poultry chain.
hero.subtitle: From the chick to the customer — your entire poultry chain, on one workspace.
hero.trustLine: Built in the UAE for poultry operators across the Middle East.

modulesHub.title: All the modules of the poultry industry, in one workspace
modulesHub.subtitle: Activate only what you need. Add more whenever your operation grows.

modules.title: The whole poultry chain, in one workspace
modules.subtitle: Activate what you need today and add the rest as your operation grows. Every module shares the same workspace, team and finance — so you never duplicate data.

broiler.whoFor: Owners and managers running broiler chicken farms — from a single house with a few thousand birds to multi-site operations with hundreds of thousands.
broiler.whoHelps: Cuts mortality through faster reaction time, drives feed conversion ratio down with daily logging, and gives you a per-batch P&L the moment the cycle ends.
features: Batches, cycles and houses with full history
Daily logs: mortality, feed, water, weights, temperature, humidity
Live FCR and mortality KPIs at the workspace and batch level
Per-batch profitability — every kilo sold versus every dirham spent
Worker-friendly mobile forms designed for one-handed use

hatchery.whoFor: Hatchery operators incubating their own eggs or running custom hatch contracts for growers.
hatchery.whoHelps: Tracks every set, every transfer, every pull — so you know hatchability and chick quality by flock, by hen age, by season.
features: Hatchability and fertility by source flock
Customer order book with delivery scheduling

freeRange.whoFor: Pasture-raised and free-range producers who need to prove welfare and traceability to retail and export buyers.
freeRange.whoHelps: Logs flock movement, range time and welfare checks alongside the same daily-log discipline as broiler — without the cage-bird assumptions.

eggProduction.whoFor: Layer farm operators — caged, barn or free-range — who need to manage flock production curves and grading throughput.
eggProduction.whoHelps: Replaces the spreadsheet stack with a real production curve per flock, daily egg counts by grade, and feed efficiency that adjusts as the flock ages.
features: Daily egg counts by grade and house
Production curve per flock against your target
Feed and water consumption per dozen

slaughterhouse.whoFor: Processing plants — your own or contract — handling live receipt through to packed product dispatch.
slaughterhouse.whoHelps: Connects what was raised on the farm to what was processed and shipped, so yields, condemnation rates and per-bird value finally line up across the operation.

marketing.whoFor: Distribution and retail teams selling the bird — wholesale, retail, food service or export.
marketing.whoHelps: Closes the loop between what you raised, what you processed and what was actually sold, so pricing decisions sit on real margin data instead of gut feel.
features: Margin reporting tied back to feed and processing cost

equipment.whoFor: Equipment suppliers and farm operators sourcing feeders, drinkers, ventilation, brooders, scales and more.
equipment.whoHelps: A shared catalogue and quote workflow so suppliers and farms talk in the same item codes, and farms know exactly what's installed in each house.

features.title: Built for the realities of poultry operations
features.subtitle: Every feature is shaped by what actually happens in the houses, not what looks good in a slide deck.

offline.title: Offline-first mobile
offline.body: Workers in the houses keep logging — mortality, feed, weights, water — even with no signal. Everything syncs the moment they're back on Wi-Fi.

team.title: Owner, managers, workers
team.body: Invite your whole team with scoped permissions. Workers see only their assigned farms and houses; managers see your whole operation.

directory.title: Multi-business directory
directory.body: Run multiple farms, shareholders or trading entities under one workspace. Switch between them in a tap.

logs.title: Daily logs that drive KPIs
logs.body: Mortality, feed, water, weights, temperature and humidity feed straight into per-batch performance, FCR and profitability.

accounting.title: Sales, expenses and invoices
accounting.body: Track every kilo sold and every bag of feed bought. Export a clean ledger when your accountant asks.

modules.title: Pay only for what you run
modules.body: Activate Broiler today, add Hatchery or Layer when you're ready. Each module is its own dashboard, with shared finance and directory underneath.

howItWorks.title: One workspace, two perspectives
howItWorks.subtitle: Owners see the whole operation. Workers see only what they need to do their job.

steps.title: Create your workspace
steps.body: Sign up, name your business, pick the modules you operate.

steps.title: Add farms, houses and stock
steps.body: Set up your sites and starting flock. Takes minutes, not days.

steps.title: Invite your workers
steps.body: Generate access codes for each worker. They install the mobile app and log in — no email or password needed.

steps.title: See everything live
steps.body: Mortality, feed and FCR roll up from the houses to your dashboard in real time.

steps.title: Log in with their access code
steps.body: No email, no password, no shared owner login.

steps.title: Only their assigned farm
steps.body: Workers see only the houses they're scoped to — nothing else.

steps.title: Log the day's numbers
steps.body: Mortality, feed, weights, water, temperature — fast forms designed for one-handed use.

steps.title: Keeps working offline
steps.body: Even with no signal in the houses. Syncs automatically when they're back online.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, coming soon
pricing.body: We're finalizing our subscription plans. PoultryManager is free for early-access workspaces while we shape the right tiers with our first customers. Contact us for a custom quote.

mobileApps.title: Native apps, built for the working day
mobileApps.body: Fast one-handed forms, large tap targets that work with gloves, and an offline-first sync engine that keeps logging the moment reception drops. Available on iOS and Android.

faq.title: Straight answers for owners and managers
faq.subtitle: The questions every poultry operator asks before they sign up. If yours isn't here, send us a message — we answer personally.

items.q: How long does it take to get my farm set up?
items.a: Most workspaces are operational the same day. You sign up, name your business, add your farms and houses, generate access codes for your workers, and you're logging that evening's mortality. There is no installation, no on-site visit, no months-long onboarding. For larger operations with several sites we'll do a 30-minute kick-off call to set you up properly — that's the longest it ever takes.

items.q: My workers aren't tech-savvy. Will they actually use this?
items.a: We designed the worker app for exactly that reality. There's no email or password — workers log in with a short access code you generate. The forms are big-tap, one-handed, and only show the farm they're assigned to. Most workers are logging mortality and feed by the second day without any training. If they can use WhatsApp, they can use PoultryManager.

items.q: Can I run multiple farms, or different businesses, from one account?
items.a: Yes. One workspace can hold multiple businesses (separate legal entities, partners, brands), and each business can hold multiple farms with their own houses, flocks and finance. You switch between them in a tap. Workers stay scoped to whichever sites you've assigned them, even when they sit inside the same workspace as your other operations.

items.q: What if my internet drops in the houses?
items.a: The mobile app is built offline-first. Workers keep logging mortality, feed, weights, water and environment readings even with zero signal. Everything queues locally on their phone and syncs automatically the moment they walk back into Wi-Fi range. No data is ever lost to a dropped connection.

PoultryManager is currently free for early-access workspaces while we shape the right plans with our first customers. Paid tiers will launch later this year; existing early-access workspaces will get written notice and a transition window before any billing begins. Talk to us for a custom quote if you have a larger operation.

items.q: Who owns my data, and can I get it out if I ever stop using PoultryManager?
items.a: You own your data, full stop. Every record you create — flocks, daily logs, sales, expenses, photos — belongs to your workspace. You can request a full export in JSON or CSV at any time, no questions asked. We retain your data for 90 days after cancellation in case you change your mind, then permanently delete it. Full details are in our Privacy Policy.

items.q: Can I export to my accountant or pull this data into other tools?
items.a: Yes. Sales, expenses and invoices export to clean CSV files your accountant can open in Excel or import into Xero, Zoho Books, Tally or QuickBooks. A read-only API is on the roadmap for direct integrations — message us if you have a specific tool you need to connect.

items.q: My operation works a bit differently. Can PoultryManager handle it?
items.a: Probably yes — and if not yet, tell us. PoultryManager is built in the UAE and shaped by working with real poultry operators on the ground, so the defaults already reflect a wide range of how farms actually run. If you have a workflow we haven't covered, send us a note. Real customer requirements drive every release.

ctaFooter.title: Ready to put your whole poultry chain on one screen?
ctaFooter.body: Join the early-access workspaces already using PoultryManager to track every flock, every kilo, every dirham.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what PoultryManager collects, what we deliberately do not collect, how we use your data, and the rights you have over it.

body.heading: 1. Who we are
paragraphs: PoultryManager is operated by Estera Tech LLC, a company based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
For any privacy question or request, write to info@esteratech.com or support@poultrymanager.io. You can also reach us on WhatsApp at +971 52 244 4195.

body.heading: 2. What we collect — and what we do not
paragraphs: We are deliberate about what we collect. The lists below are exhaustive.

list: Account data — your first name, last name, email, optional phone number, and an account password stored only as a salted hash.

Workspace data you create — businesses, farms, houses, contacts, workers, and the operational records you log: batches, cycles, daily logs (mortality, feed, water, weights, temperature, humidity), sales, expenses and invoices.

Photos and documents you upload — receipts, documents, and any photos you choose to attach to records. Captured from your device camera or selected from your photo library only when you tap the attach action. We never browse your photo library or take photos in the background.
Precise location — only when you use the Farm Location Picker to set a farm's coordinates. Captured once per save when you tap the map, never in the background.
Diagnostic data — basic crash logs and minimal usage events (which screens loaded, did the request succeed) so we can fix bugs.
Your phone book contacts. We never access your contact list.
Microphone or audio. The microphone is explicitly disabled in our mobile app build.
Background location. We never track your location while the app is closed.
Advertising identifiers. We do not run ads and do not share data with ad networks.
Biometric data, health data, or financial account credentials.
Browsing history outside the app.

body.heading: 3. How we use your data
paragraphs: We use the data above to run the service for you: render your dashboards, sync your workers' logs, generate invoices and reports, send transactional email, fix crashes, and respond when you contact support. That's it.

body.heading: 4. Research use of operational data
paragraphs: Aggregated and anonymized operational data — including mortality counts, feed conversion rates, growth performance, environmental readings, and similar production metrics — may be used by Estera Tech to produce industry research, benchmarks, and product improvements.

No personal information, no business name, no farm name, and no individual workspace is identifiable in any research output. Research aggregates always involve large pools of workspaces and never single you out.

If you would prefer your workspace's operational data to be excluded entirely from research aggregates, email support@poultrymanager.io and we will tag your workspace research-opt-out. We will honor that flag from the next aggregation cycle onward.

body.heading: 5. Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell your data. We share it only with the subprocessors we need to run the service:
list: Cloud hosting and database hosting (managed providers in the EU and US).
Transactional email delivery.
Crash and error monitoring.
Payment processing — when paid plans launch. No payment data is currently collected.
body.trailingParagraph: A current list of subprocessors is available on request.

body.heading: 6. Where your data is stored
paragraphs: Servers are located in the EU and US, depending on subprocessor. Data in transit is encrypted via HTTPS / TLS. Account passwords are stored only as bcrypt hashes — even we cannot read them.

body.heading: 7. Retention
paragraphs: We keep your workspace data while your account is active and for up to 90 days after cancellation, then permanently delete it. You can request earlier deletion at any time by emailing support.

body.heading: 8. Your rights
paragraphs: You can ask us to:
list: Access the data we hold about your workspace.
Export your data — we provide a JSON or CSV export on request.
Correct inaccurate data.
Delete your account and data.
Opt out of research aggregation (see section 4).
body.trailingParagraph: To exercise any of these rights, email support@poultrymanager.io from the email address on your account.

body.heading: 9. Children
paragraphs: PoultryManager is a business application and is not intended for users under 16.

body.heading: 10. Device permissions, explained
paragraphs: Our mobile app asks for the smallest set of device permissions needed to do its job. Each one is requested only when you use the feature that needs it:
list: Camera — to take a photo of a receipt or document and attach it to a record.
Photo library — to pick an existing photo to attach.
Location — precise GPS coordinates, foreground only, captured once when you drop a pin on the Farm Location Picker. Never used in the background.
Network access — to sync your data with our servers.

body.heading: 11. Changes to this policy
paragraphs: We post any change to this policy at this URL and notify workspace owners by email for material changes.

body.heading: 12. Contact
paragraphs: Estera Tech LLC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Email: info@esteratech.com or support@poultrymanager.io.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of PoultryManager, a software service operated by Estera Tech LLC.

body.heading: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: By creating an account or installing the PoultryManager mobile app, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

body.heading: 2. The service
paragraphs: PoultryManager is a software-as-a-service platform operated by Estera Tech LLC. It provides tools for managing poultry industry operations across broiler raising, hatchery, free-range, egg production, slaughterhouse, marketing and equipment trading.

body.heading: 3. Workspace and account model
paragraphs: Every workspace has one owner. The owner can invite sub-users (managers, workers, accountants). Sub-users inherit access from the owner and never have a separate subscription.
The owner is responsible for what their team does in the workspace, including any data their sub-users enter.

body.heading: 4. Acceptable use
paragraphs: You agree not to:
list: Reverse engineer, scrape, or otherwise abuse the service.
Resell or sublicense access to the service without a written agreement with Estera Tech.
Use the service to violate any law in your jurisdiction.
Attempt to access workspaces, accounts, or data that are not yours.

body.heading: 5. Your data
paragraphs: Your workspace data — the records you create, photos you upload, contacts you store — belongs to you. You can export it on request.
You grant Estera Tech a limited license to host, transmit and back up that data solely to operate the service for you. We do not claim ownership of your data and we do not sell it.

body.heading: 6. Aggregated research data
paragraphs: You agree that Estera Tech may use aggregated and anonymized operational data — including mortality counts, feed conversion rates, growth performance, environmental readings and similar production metrics — for industry research, benchmarks, and product improvement.

No personal information, no business name, and no individual workspace is identifiable in any research output. You may opt your workspace out of research aggregation by emailing support@poultrymanager.io. See Privacy Policy section 4 for details.

body.heading: 7. Subscriptions and billing
paragraphs: PoultryManager is currently free for early-access workspaces. Paid subscription tiers are in development.
When paid plans launch we will give existing early-access workspaces written notice and a transition window before any billing begins.

body.heading: 8. Service availability
paragraphs: We aim to keep the service available 24/7 but do not guarantee uninterrupted operation. The mobile app continues to work offline and queues your data locally; nothing on your device is lost during a temporary outage. Once connectivity returns, queued data syncs automatically.

body.heading: 9. Disclaimers
paragraphs: The service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
PoultryManager is a record-keeping and analytics tool. It does not replace veterinary, financial, or legal advice.

body.heading: 10. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Estera Tech LLC's aggregate liability for any claim arising out of or related to the service is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the 12 months preceding the claim, or USD 100, whichever is greater.
We are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, revenue, data, or business.

body.heading: 11. Termination
paragraphs: You can stop using the service at any time. We can suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
On termination we delete your data per the Privacy Policy retention schedule.

body.heading: 12. Changes to these terms
paragraphs: We may update these terms. Material changes will be notified to workspace owners by email. Continued use of the service after a change constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

body.heading: 13. Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any dispute arising out of or related to these terms or the service will be resolved exclusively in the courts of Dubai, UAE.

body.heading: 14. Contact
paragraphs: Estera Tech LLC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Email: info@esteratech.com or support@poultrymanager.io.

accountDeletion.title: Delete your account
accountDeletion.intro: This page explains exactly how to request that we delete your PoultryManager account and the data associated with it. We honor every request — no questions asked.

summary.label: Quick summary
summary.body: Email support@poultrymanager.io from the email address on your account, with the subject "Delete account". We confirm receipt within 5 business days and complete the deletion within 30 days.

body.heading: 1. Who can request deletion
paragraphs: Account owners can request deletion of their own account at any time, which removes the entire workspace including all sub-users, farms, batches, daily logs, sales, expenses, photos and any other data tied to that workspace.

Sub-users (workers, managers, accountants invited by an owner) do not have their own deletable account — they exist inside an owner's workspace. To remove a sub-user, the workspace owner can revoke their access from inside the app at any time, or contact support and we'll remove them on the owner's behalf.

body.heading: 2. How to request deletion
paragraphs: Send an email to support@poultrymanager.io from the email address registered on your account, with the following details:
list: Subject line: "Delete account"
Confirmation that you want your account and all associated data permanently deleted
Optional: a short reason (helps us improve the product, but not required)
body.trailingParagraph: We confirm receipt within 5 business days and complete the deletion within 30 days. You will receive a final email when the deletion is complete.

body.heading: 3. What gets deleted
paragraphs: When we delete your account, the following is permanently removed from our systems:
list: Your account profile (name, email, phone, password hash)
Your entire workspace and every record inside it: businesses, farms, houses, contacts, workers, batches, cycles
All daily logs (mortality, feed, water, weights, temperature, humidity)
All sales, expenses, invoices, and other accounting records
All photos and documents you uploaded
All sub-user accounts you created inside your workspace
Cached copies on our backup systems (within 30 days of the deletion confirmation)

body.heading: 4. What we may retain — and why
paragraphs: A small set of records may be retained even after account deletion, strictly to meet legal, security, or accounting obligations:
list: Anonymized aggregate operational metrics that have already been folded into industry research aggregates (these contain no personal information, no business name, and cannot be linked back to you — see Privacy Policy section 4). If you opted out of research aggregation before requesting deletion, this does not apply.

Financial records (invoices, payment receipts) for the period required by United Arab Emirates VAT and corporate tax law — typically 5 years from the end of the relevant tax period. These records do not include your operational data.
Security and abuse-investigation logs for up to 90 days (IP addresses tied to login attempts, anti-fraud signals).
Records of your deletion request itself, so we can prove to regulators and to you that the deletion was honored.
body.trailingParagraph: Nothing in this retained set is used for marketing, profiling, or any purpose other than legal compliance and security.

body.heading: 5. Timeline
paragraphs: Day 0 — You email support@poultrymanager.io requesting deletion. Your access to the account is revoked immediately so no one can log in.
Within 5 business days — We email you to confirm we received the request and have started the removal process.
Within 30 days — Your account, workspace and all the data listed in section 3 are permanently deleted from our production systems.
Within 30 days of the production deletion — Backups containing the data are rotated out of our retention window. Nothing remains.
body.trailingParagraph: During the 30-day window your data is held in a soft-deleted state — invisible to everyone, but recoverable if you change your mind and email us before the window closes. After day 30 the deletion is irreversible.

body.heading: 6. Cancellation vs deletion
paragraphs: If you simply want to stop paying for the service but keep your data accessible in case you return, that's a cancellation, not a deletion. Cancellations keep your data intact for 90 days, then auto-delete unless you reactivate. To cancel, email support@poultrymanager.io with the subject "Cancel subscription".
Deletion is irreversible. Once we have deleted your account, we cannot restore it from backups.

body.heading: 7. Export your data first
paragraphs: If you want a copy of your data before we delete it, request an export in the same email — we provide a JSON or CSV bundle of your workspace at no charge before processing the deletion.

body.heading: 8. Contact
paragraphs: Estera Tech LLC, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Email: support@poultrymanager.io (preferred for deletion requests) or info@esteratech.com.
